instance.creationCode: talker="Protoman" stringToShow="I would suggest going to the Ostrich first. Why? Just a hunch. The desert is also fun." boxSize=2 sprite_index=sNPC_Protoman
shopType=oShopWindow shopText="Thought Wily took me out? Psh, I'm Zero!" maxInv=4 inv[0]=9 inv[1]=29 inv[2]=33 inv[3]=35 inv[4]=0 sprite_index=sNPC_ZeroIdle
